Reduced application bundle size by 20% through advanced code-splitting and React/TypeScript performance best practices.

Led and mentored a distributed cross-functional team of developers and designers, ensuring 100% on-time delivery.

Developed responsive web applications and modular components in PHP and React.js with 100% cross-browser compatibility.
